conditionDescriptions: Severe chronic kidney disease with eGFR <30 mL/min/1.73m²
contraindications.clinicalRationale: FDA-approved for use with eGFR ≥30 mL/min per 1.73 m². Clinical trials (CREDENCE) enrolled patients with eGFR ≥30 mL/min per 1.73 m². Efficacy and safety not established below this threshold.
contraindications.riskDescription: Lack of efficacy data and potential safety concerns in severe CKD
contraindications.alternativeConsiderations: Consider other glucose-lowering agents appropriate for advanced CKD
contraindications.sourceSnippet: Figure 7 — Canagliflozin: 100 mg daily (the higher dose of 300 mg is not recommended for CKD); FDA-approved eGFR ≥30 ml/min per 1.73 m². Trial enrollment: CREDENCE eGFR ≥30.

warnings.warningText: Higher dose of 300 mg is not recommended for patients with CKD. Use 100 mg daily dose only.
warnings.actionRequired: Limit canagliflozin dose to 100 mg daily in patients with CKD

warnings.warningText: Risk of diabetic ketoacidosis with SGLT2 inhibitors. In CREDENCE trial: 2.2 vs 0.2 per 1000 patient-years for canagliflozin vs placebo.
warnings.actionRequired: Monitor for signs and symptoms of diabetic ketoacidosis, especially during periods of illness or stress

warnings.warningText: Increased risk of genital mycotic infections. In CREDENCE trial: 2.27% canagliflozin vs 0.59% placebo.
warnings.affectedPopulation: All patients receiving canagliflozin, both men and women
warnings.actionRequired: Monitor for genital mycotic infections and treat with topical antifungals as needed

warnings.warningText: Higher rate of lower-limb amputations observed in CANVAS trial but not in CREDENCE trial. Risk appears trial-specific with significant heterogeneity.
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with peripheral vascular disease or high amputation risk
warnings.actionRequired: Assess amputation risk factors and monitor for foot problems, particularly in high-risk patients

warnings.warningText: Monitor for acute eGFR decline. In CREDENCE, a drop in eGFR ≥30% was uncommon (4%) but associated with modestly increased kidney adverse events.
warnings.actionRequired: Monitor eGFR after initiation and periodically thereafter. Consider temporary discontinuation if eGFR drops ≥30%

warnings.warningText: Fracture risk noted in CANVAS trial but not CANVAS-R or CREDENCE trials. Risk appears inconsistent across trials.
warnings.actionRequired: Assess fracture risk factors in patients, particularly elderly or those with osteoporosis risk
